prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年浙江省综合类最低录取位次分别为约69707名→72220名→172302名（断档）→82074名→89443名。排除2023年断档异常值后，近四年位次整体呈后移趋势 ，2024至2025年后移约7369名，2025年基准位次约89443名；该校在浙江省综合类招生计划：2021年46人、2022年46人、2023年56人、2024年56人、2025年70人；2026年计划60人，较2025年缩招10人（-14.3%），缩招使竞争略有缓解，位次数字理论上应减小。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 石河子大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国 大学排名从2021年第165名持续上升至2026年第135名，排名稳步提升，反映学校综合实力增强；2022年声誉偏负面（宿舍改造问题），近年无明显负面舆情；抖 音综合热度排名第58位（较热），视频数16条，有一定社会关注度；未见投档线断档记录；第五轮学科评估中石河子大学无A-及以上等级学科，优势学科以农学 、医学为主，但未进入A类评级，对高分考生吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程及其自动化、临床医学、口腔医学等专业社会热度持续偏热/高热；机械类 、环境工程等偏冷。浙江省2026年考生总数约40万人（较2025年29万大幅增长约37.5%），竞争显著加剧；石河子大学位于新疆，距浙江较远，跨省报考存在地域偏好劣势；该校在浙江招生占比约1.5%–2%，属外省招生规模中等水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综 合2025年基准位次89443名、2026年缩招10人（位次减小约7666名）与浙江省考生数暴增约37.5%（竞争加剧）两大相反方向因素，考生数大幅增长的影响超过缩招效应，预计2026 年最低录取位次。预测最低位次约81977名，区间81477–82477名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Zhejiang Province's comprehensive category were approximately 69707 → 72220 → 172302 (discontinuity) → 82074 → 89443. Excluding the 2023 discontinuity anomaly, the rankings over the past four years show an overall backward trend, with a shift of about 7369 places from 2024 to 2025, and a baseline ranking of about 89443 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan in Zhejiang Province's comprehensive category: 46 in 2021, 46 in 2022, 56 in 2023, 56 in 2024, 70 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 60, a reduction of 10 students (-14.3%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition and theoretically should decrease the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shihezi University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science China university ranking has steadily risen from 165th in 2021 to 135th in 2026, reflecting an enhancement in overall strength. In 2022, reputation was slightly negative (dormitory renovation issue), with no significant negative public opinion in recent years. It ranks 58th in comprehensive Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with 16 videos, indicating a certain level of social attention. No records of admission line discontinuity were found. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Shihezi University has no disciplines rated A- or above; its advantageous disciplines are mainly in agriculture and medicine, but they have not entered the A-class rating, limiting appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Clinical Medicine, and Stomatology continue to be relatively hot/very hot in social popularity; majors like Mechanical Engineering and Environmental Engineering are relatively cold. In 2026, the total number of candidates in Zhejiang Province is about 400,000 (a significant increase of about 37.5% from 290,000 in 2025), intensifying competition. Shihezi University is located in Xinjiang, far from Zhejiang, with a geographical disadvantage for cross-province applications. The university's enrollment proportion in Zhejiang is about 1.5%–2%, which is a medium scale for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 89443, the 2026 enrollment reduction of 10 students (ranking decrease of about 7666), and the sharp increase of about 37.5% in the number of candidates in Zhejiang Province (intensified competition), the impact of the candidate number increase outweighs the enrollment reduction effect. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 81977, with a range of 81477–82477.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 81977, with a range of 81477–82477. Candidates within this ranking range are advised to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 81000) can focus on aiming for Tier 1 popular majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation (Top Innovation Class) and Accounting (Top Innovation Class); candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (e.g., outside 82000) should mainly choose Tier 2 majors like Electronic Information Engineering with good employment prospects, and select Tier 3 majors like Computer Science and Software Engineering as alternatives.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2021, the minimum ranking for Medicine was 68294 (plan 12), in 2022 it was 66653 (plan 16), in 2023 it was 72934 (plan 8), in 2024 it was 86723 (plan 8), and in 2025 it was 117730 (plan 16). In 2026, the enrollment plan for Medicine is reduced to 12, a decrease of 4 from 2025, a reduction of about 25%, exerting downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shihezi University is located in Xinjiang and is a national '211 Project' key construction university and a 'Double First-Class' construction university. It is a comprehensive public undergraduate institution with a high reputation in the northwestern region, and its medical disciplines are among its traditional strengths.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of medical majors continues to rise, with fierce competition in core specialties such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology. Shihezi University is located in Xinjiang, and the geographical distance has some impact on Zhejiang candidates, but medical majors maintain high attention due to their employment stability and social status. In 2026, only 4 majors are offered in Medicine, with a small enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model and the recent upward trend in medical rankings, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Medicine in 2026 will be approximately 103071, with a fluctuation range of 102576 to 103566. Compared to 2025, the ranking will decline, mainly due to enrollment reduction, but the popularity of medicine still supports a relatively high ranking.
